text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm going to put all my energy into it today!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Last time, I let you and the cute, younger
students down...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Last time, I let you and the cute, younger
students down...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But in this race, I'm going to run so fast that
everyone's going to wig out!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer! All right, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer! All right, here I go!
